displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff
synopsis: "The Pengalan Tradeoff", initially listed with the subtitle The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff, is a short story written by Aaron Allston and illustrated by Tommy Lee Edwards. It was originally printed in Star Wars Insider 65 and was later republished as Hyperspace Fiction on January 27, 2006.
title: The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff
